comparison_scope.statement: All four frozen application snapshots are judged against the same requirements and evidence protocol. Historical build duration is reported separately because the company application and external tool outputs do not share equivalent creation histories.

evaluation_environment.browser: Chromium supplied by the installed Playwright version
evaluation_environment.network: enabled only for dependency installation and application runtime

time_limits.timer_starts: after the application snapshot, evaluator machine, required credentials, and documented start command are available
time_limits.timer_stops: after final evidence capture or the total limit

snapshot_policy.score_describes: the exact preserved snapshot, not the vendor generally

allowed_environment_actions: create environment files from the submitted example
select unused local ports without changing application behavior
install dependencies using the submitted lock files
start documented infrastructure and database services
normalize line endings when the runtime requires it
retry one command when a documented transient infrastructure failure is proven
prohibited_actions: add, remove, or rewrite product features
change tests to hide a failure
alter benchmark scenarios or expected outcomes
manually edit database rows to manufacture success
use vendor marketing material as product evidence
allowed_fixes.retry_rule: One retry is allowed only for an infrastructure failure unrelated to application behavior. Both attempts must be preserved.

required_test_cases.requirement: complete consent, all three scenarios, and completion
refresh after one answer and recover the next unanswered scenario
redirect invalid incomplete and completed routes safely
show recoverable participant errors without losing valid state
verify three submitted responses in the relational database
complete supervisor questions and analysis with zero research API submissions
reset browser-tab supervisor state without changing participant data
complete the core participant interaction using keyboard controls
run an automated accessibility scan and preserve the raw report
preserve dependency and source-security scan results
produce a release build from the frozen snapshot
run a public-frontend smoke test against the complete stack

evidence_rules.missing_evidence: criterion remains unscored while evaluation is pending; after an application is marked complete, missing evidence yields score 0

scoring_procedure.disagreement_resolution: record both scores, discuss evidence only, and document the final score with rationale
